title: OREGON DISABILITIES COMMISSION - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES OREGON DISABILITIES COMMISSION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and hears the concerns of individuals with disabilities and uses the information to prioritize public policy issues which should be addressed, educates and advises the Oregon Department of Human Services (ODHS), the Governor, the Legislative Assembly and appropriate state agency administrators on how public policy can be improved to meet the needs of individuals with disabilities. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email - (800) 282-8096 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 282-8096 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disability Rights Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S INTENSIVE IN-HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON DEAF AND HARD OF HEARING SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON HOME CARE COMMISSION INFORMATION SERVICES - BRAIN INJURY PROGRAM TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - GENERAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES
